entities.name: EndoBio AI
entities.summary: An AI-native agricultural intelligence platform that detects biological crop signals before visible symptoms appear.

entities.name: Sanofi
entities.summary: Keshav worked on AI and machine learning systems in pharmaceutical R&D.

relationships.summary: Keshav is building EndoBio AI as his current company.
Beauty is part of Keshav's personal life and homepage identity.
Keshav's AI and biotech experience helped shape his path into AI-native biological systems.

memories.title: Why EndoBio exists
memories.text: Keshav believes agriculture detects disease too late. EndoBio is based on the idea that plants, pathogens, and soil systems emit molecular signals before visible symptoms appear.

memories.title: Current chapter
memories.text: Keshav is currently focused on building EndoBio AI, combining molecular sensing, knowledge graphs, edge AI, and agricultural decision support.

memories.title: Breakfast fact
memories.text: Keshav ate waffles and chicken with bbq and maple syrup for breakfast.

memories.title: Kitchen fridge fact
memories.text: Keshav has two fridges in his kitchen.
